ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Cheesecake (43%) [Skimmed Milk, Cream (Milk), Sugar, Rapeseed Oil, Cage Free Egg, Wheat Flour, Modified Maize Starch, Water, Wheat Starch, Whey Powder (Milk), Skimmed Milk Powder, Natural Flavouring, Acidity Regulator (330), Gelling Agent (440), Modified Starch (1422). Palm Oil**, Emulsifier (471** From Palm), Cage Free Egg White Powder, Starter Culture (Milk). Thickeners (415, 401), Salt, Vegetarian Rennet], Biscuit Base (21%) [Wheat Flour, Palm Fat**, Brown Sugar, Water, Sugar, Inverted Sugar Syrup, Raising Agents (500, Ammonium Carbonates), Rapeseed Oil, Emulsifier (471** From Palm), Acidity Regulator (330)], Berry Sauce (20%) [Inverted Sugar Syrup, Water, Blackcurrant Purée (13%), Black Carrot Juice Concentrate. Acidity Regulators (330, 331), Modified Maize Starch, Dextrose, Thickeners (406, 410), Sugar, Natural Flavouring], Blackcurrants (8%), Redcurrants (4.0%), Raspberries (4.0%). Allergy Advice Contains wheat, gluten, egg, milk. May contain almond, hazelnut, pecan, pistachio, walnut.
